tasks.title: Auto-normalize single source_lines
tasks.acceptance: ParseLineRanges normalizes single numbers to ranges. Test cases 1-6 pass. Invalid inputs still error.
tasks.closed_reason: ParseLineRanges normalizes '72' to 72-72, '4-10,72,80-90' to three ranges. Invalid inputs (zero, negative, abc, partial) still error. 14 test cases pass.

tasks.title: Dependency-aware batch close toposort
tasks.acceptance: Batch close toposorts entries by deps. Behavior table 9 scenarios pass. Skipped counter and reordered field present.
tasks.closed_reason: toposortBatchEntries: builds in-batch dep graph including covered_by, computes depth, stable sorts by depth ascending. skippedCount for already-done, reordered bool always in output. Idempotent test updated.

tasks.title: Batch output schema changes
tasks.acceptance: Results array has status field (closed/failed/skipped). reordered always present. Test cases 1-8 pass.
tasks.closed_reason: Results array includes status via existing batchFailure struct. reordered always present (bool). skipped counter tracks already-done entries. Test cases covered in batch-toposort commit.

tasks.title: Lint rule: duplicate consecutive lines
tasks.acceptance: tp lint detects consecutive duplicate non-empty lines. Code blocks excluded. Context truncated to 80 chars. Test cases 1-5 pass.
tasks.closed_reason: CheckDuplicateConsecutiveLines: consecutive non-empty lines detected, code blocks excluded, context truncated 80 chars. 10 test cases pass.

tasks.title: Lint rule: section numbering gaps
tasks.acceptance: tp lint detects heading numbering gaps. Reports all missing numbers. First heading sets baseline. Test cases 1-5 pass.
tasks.closed_reason: CheckNumberingGaps: groups headings by parent+level, reports all missing numbers, first heading sets baseline. 5 test cases pass.

tasks.title: Import accepts bare JSON arrays
tasks.acceptance: tp import detects bare array and wraps with --spec flag. NDJSON detection shows parse error. Test cases 1-5 pass.
tasks.closed_reason: Bare array detected by first byte [, wraps into TaskFile with --spec required. NDJSON heuristic (2+ lines starting {) after TaskFile parse failure. Existing TaskFile format unchanged.

tasks.title: Spec-only disclaimer in review prompts
tasks.acceptance: Disclaimer prepended to spec-only review modes. Mode table enforced. Test cases 1-5 pass.
tasks.closed_reason: specOnlyDisclaimer constant added, appendSpecOnlyDisclaimer prepends to all 3 prompts when affectedSection is empty. Code-audit and --affected-files modes excluded. Verify mode unaffected.

tasks.title: Did-you-mean for covered_by errors
tasks.acceptance: Suggest similar IDs on covered_by miss. Split on hyphens, 3+ char words. Top 3 ranked. Test cases 1-5 pass.
tasks.closed_reason: SuggestSimilarIDs: prefix match + word overlap (3+ chars), sorted by tier then length, top 3. coveredByHint wired into single and batch done paths. 5 test cases + splitWords tests pass.

tasks.title: Update SKILL.md, README, CLAUDE.md
tasks.acceptance: New behaviors documented in all three files.
tasks.closed_reason: SKILL.md: batch auto-toposort section rewritten, source_lines auto-normalize note updated. README: 7 new AX principle rows. CLAUDE.md: 3 new convention lines for lint, batch, import.
